subject: Andy Smith House
body:
Good Morning Sir,

Bill and I have both looked at the Smith House and have a few questions:

Level of Finish
If this is for you, the kitchen would have to be relocated
# of Bathrooms and Bedrooms needed

We are going to see what Andy has for Arch. Plans, but your input would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,  Dan


      ____________________________________________________________________________________

body_html:
Good Morning Sir,
 
Bill and I have both looked at the Smith House and have a few questions:
 
  • Level of Finish
  • If this is for you, the kitchen would have to be relocated
  • # of Bathrooms and Bedrooms needed

 

We are going to see what Andy has for Arch. Plans, but your input would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thanks,  Dan
